summary.heading: Professional Summary
summary.text: Up and coming Computer Science graduate with a passion for software development and a strong work ethic. I am a quick learner and have a knack for problem-solving. I am a team player and am always willing to help out my peers.

education.degree: Masters of Science in Computer Science
education.degreeInfo: Concentration in Data Mining and Intelligent Systems

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
education.degreeInfo: Concentration in Data Science, Minor in Mathematics

roles.title: College Intern, Technical
bullets: Develop an application in Visual Basic .NET to interact with the Microsoft Visio API to check Visio drawings for human errors
Develop various other Visual Basic .NET applications to assist with electrical engineering drawing and design
Participate in two-week sprints as part of a scrum team to coordinate and communicate with other members

work.company: The University of Alabama in Huntsville

roles.title: Student Specialist
bullets: Organize and provide physical manpower during on-campus student events.

roles.title: Intramural Referee
bullets: Collaborate with other referee officials to maintain sporting integrity among competitors.
Organize schedules and availability of various athletic events.

roles.title: Student Ambassador
bullets: Represent the University of Alabama in Huntsville as a student ambassador.
Influence prospective students by providing tours of campus, catering to questions, and providing guidance.

leadership.title: Recruitment Committee Member, IFC Delegate
bullets: Raise over $150,000 annually for various causes and charities through events such as Battle of the Buffalo, Auto Emporium, and BillHallum Annual Golf Tournament
Perform over 350 hours of community service in the Huntsville area
Organize events, make meaningful connections with, and draw in potential new members as part of a committee

leadership.title: President, Captain
bullets: Organize practices, matches, and maintain equipment for the university club team.
Oversee logistics such as flow of money, conversing with UAH officials, and ensuring standards are upheld.

leadership.title: Delegate
bullets: Represented the Alpha Tau Omega Fraternity in a council consisting of differing chapters of fraternities' members.
Upheld a standard set of bylaws and planned social events to further create bonds and a more collaborative environment between different chapters.

leadership.title: College of Science Representative
bullets: Represented the student body of the College of Science by discussing and bringing forth issues and ideas to further improve campus to the student-run government.
